examples: I had to go to the toilet, but I didn't want to use that awful outhouse. So I went off in the woods.
Outhouse racing has its own World Championship.
Why don't we just patch on an outhouse in the back yard?
It sat within an imposing vineyard estate, where now only the rundown outhouse is still standing.
It also plans to repair and refurbish a 19th Century outhouse and covert it into a visitor centre.
